data.content: Implemented one dispatch-level Swap Agent control and removed per-step swap UI. Added SettingsDispatchGlobalSwap to replace agents globally across action mappings and pool steps in a single patchSettings save, added swapActionsAgent utility with regression tests, and kept weighted pool swap semantics intact. Integrated on main and pushed (commit 30b8ca3b). Validation: bun run lint (warnings only), bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test, NODE_ENV=production bun run build.
